purpose: Checkpoint 2 state-aware Explore room library seed.

rooms.vocab_hall: Course 10 concepts translated through selected DISC, subtype, stage, and OHU.
rooms.story_square: NPC scene grammar selected by primary type character, subtype tone, stage pressure, and OHU expression.
rooms.reaction_alley: Overdeveloped, healthy, and underdeveloped response comparison for selected type and stage pressure.
rooms.pillar_market: Nine-pillar interpretation of the selected state with state-specific body text.

next_checkpoint_note: This is still deterministic demo content. It prepares the overlay packet shape before live HSIE or Sol's Odyssey integration.
